title: WRAP PARTY
location: Home of Jim and Carie Zehnder, 8 E Creek Pl, Menlo Park, CA 94025
description:
Bring your instruments
or just come by to enjoy a
cold one with seminar
friends new and old.
If you have an evening
fight to catch, bring your
uber to the airport.
